description: Wave 1 - M03 Device and Sensor Input: Implement equipment state and DI/DO interfaces with Modbus simulator. Branch: feat/m03-device-sensor-input
steps: Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/io/interface.go defining IOAdapter interface: Connect, ReadDI, WriteDO, Health, Close
Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/io/types.go with DIState, DOCommand, IOHealth, ModbusConfig structs
Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/io/simulator/scenarios.go with scenarios: running, stopped, restart_requested, offline, timeout
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/equipment/state.go with EquipmentState (RUNNING, STOPPED, RESTART_REQUESTED, UNKNOWN) and TTL/quality tracking
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/equipment/state_test.go testing state transitions and staleness detection
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/equipment/manager.go managing multiple equipment states with polling logic
Create simulators/io/README.md documenting I/O simulator usage
Ensure stale DI input maps to UNKNOWN equipment state
Ensure no direct power switching logic (outputs go to PLC/Safety Relay only)
Run make build and make test
acceptance_criteria: IOAdapter interface supports 8DI/8DO as per spec
Equipment state correctly transitions to UNKNOWN on stale input
Simulator can produce all scenario types
No direct machine power control logic exists
